message:
feat(ffs-core): add OpenFs API with detect-parse-validate pipeline (bd-3is)

Define OpenFs type that bundles validated superblock, pre-computed
ext4 geometry (groups_count, group_desc_size, csum_seed), and block
device handle. Constructor validates by default via validate_v1() so
callers cannot forget validation. Includes OpenOptions with
skip_validation escape hatch for recovery workflows. Adds
parse_error_to_ffs() for mount-time ParseError→FfsError conversion
with context-aware variant selection (UnsupportedFeature vs
InvalidGeometry vs Format). 7 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
